name: dataform-scout
description: Monitor Google Cloud Dataform error logs and auto-fix failing .sqlx files using Claude Code.
author: martinet.v@sfeir.com

skills.name: fix-dataform
skills.description: Analyze and fix a failing Dataform .sqlx file based on a GCP error log entry.

skills.name: scout-configure
skills.description: Interactively configure the GCP log scope (project, folder, or organization) for the scout daemon.

commands.name: scout
commands.description: Run a 24-hour lookback on Dataform error logs then start real-time log streaming.

commands.name: scout-configure
commands.description: Configure the GCP log scope (project, folder, or organization) watched by the scout daemon.
